endpoints.name: Retrieve built-in policy definitions
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the built-in policy definitions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a built-in policy definition.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the built-in policy definition with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Retrieve policy definitions in a management group
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the policy definitions in a given management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a policy definition in a management group.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the policy definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a policy definition in a management group.
endpoints.description: This operation creates or updates a policy definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a policy definition in a management group.
endpoints.description: This operation deletes the policy definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Retrieves policy definitions in a subscription
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the policy definitions in a given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a policy definition in a subscription.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the policy definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a policy definition in a subscription.
endpoints.description: This operation creates or updates a policy definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a policy definition in a subscription.
endpoints.description: This operation deletes the policy definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.
